title: My First Princess Make Up Kit – Kids Washable Makeup Set for Girls – Non-Toxic Pretend Play Cosmetic Beauty Toy Set with Bag – Party Set for Girls, Birthday, Halloween & Dress Up
features: 🌺 OPTIMAL KIT: Comes in a soft lovely bag to keep all the accessories tidy and secure and is perfect for compact travel. Includes cosmetic brushes, lipsticks, glitter lip gloss, blush and eye shadow, nail polishes, and a bag!

🌺 LOOKS REALISTIC: Soft material that feels like actual makeup to the touch. Your princess will think she's putting on real makeup just without the mess! The makeup is fully washable and comes off right away. It's entirely non-toxic with child safety in mind.

🌺 UNLEASHES IMAGINATION: Has multiple colors and shapes, and helps develop essential hand-eye coordination, and social skills. The kit stimulates your girl's imagination, promotes originality and lets her creativity run free.

🌺 PRETEND PLAY: This makeup set is fantastic for role playing. She'll feel like an adult with her sophisticated array of beauty equipment. Her friends will love coming over to do each other's makeup and pretend they're at a beauty parlor! It occupies the girls for hours of endless fun!

🌺 PERFECT GIFT: Looking for something special for your little princess? Don't look any further than this! This long-lasting kit is of great quality and price and will leave your girl feeling like a million dollars! Introduce your little girl today with 'my first princess makeup set'!
description: From the manufacturer Glam up and play! Playkidz My First Princess Washable Cosmetic and Real Makeup Set with designer floral cosmetic bag. This is a Perfect makeup kit, designed for little girls to dress up with vibrant shades and great textures that encourage your child's imagination and provides entertainment. Pretend makeup kit that is sure to please your little princess. This set is splendid for little makeup beginners and for the little pro's. Why you'll love Playkidiz Princess Makeup Set: Easily washable Safe & non-toxic Travel easy makeup bag Hours of fun :) What you get: 2 Glitter Lip Gloss 1 Red & 1 Pink Lipstick 2 Makeup Brushes 2 Nail Polish Blush & Eyeshadow palettes 1 Cosmetics Bag
